query: SELECT COUNT(*) as sem_zona FROM warehouseLocations WHERE zoneId IS NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as com_zona FROM warehouseLocations WHERE zoneId IS NOT NULL; SELECT wz.code, COUNT(wl.id) as locations FROM warehouseZones wz LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON wl.zoneId = wz.id GROUP BY wz.id, wz.code ORDER BY wz.code;
